title: hieracium lamprophyllum subsp. asturicum
intro: Hieracium lamprophyllum subsp. asturicum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium lamprophyllum subsp. asturicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
